'''âj-f-h''' ('''jafaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:annect|annect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:annect|annect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-h
|-
! Lemma
| jafaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafahithi|jafahithi]] || [[word:jafahiji|jafahiji]] || [[word:jafahishi|jafahishi]] || [[word:jafahi|jafahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafahuthuth|jafahuthuth]] || [[word:jafahujuj|jafahujuj]] || [[word:jafahushush|jafahushush]] || [[word:jafah|jafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafahuthu|jafahuthu]] || [[word:jafahuju|jafahuju]] || [[word:jafahushu|jafahushu]] || [[word:jafahu|jafahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafahufuth|jafahufuth]] || [[word:jafahufuj|jafahufuj]] || [[word:jafahufush|jafahufush]] || [[word:jafahuf|jafahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafahethe|jafahethe]] || [[word:jafaheje|jafaheje]] || [[word:jafaheshe|jafaheshe]] || [[word:jafahe|jafahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafahothoth|jafahothoth]] || [[word:jafahojoj|jafahojoj]] || [[word:jafahoshosh|jafahoshosh]] || [[word:jafah|jafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafahotho|jafahotho]] || [[word:jafahojo|jafahojo]] || [[word:jafahosho|jafahosho]] || [[word:jafaho|jafaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafahofoth|jafahofoth]] || [[word:jafahofoj|jafahofoj]] || [[word:jafahofosh|jafahofosh]] || [[word:jafahof|jafahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafahĂŠthĂŠ|jafahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jafahĂŠjĂŠ|jafahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jafahĂŠshĂŠ|jafahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jafahĂŠ|jafahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafahathath|jafahathath]] || [[word:jafahajaj|jafahajaj]] || [[word:jafahashash|jafahashash]] || [[word:jafah|jafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafahatha|jafahatha]] || [[word:jafahaja|jafahaja]] || [[word:jafahasha|jafahasha]] || [[word:jafaha|jafaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafahafath|jafahafath]] || [[word:jafahafaj|jafahafaj]] || [[word:jafahafash|jafahafash]] || [[word:jafahaf|jafahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jafahasha|jafahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojafahasha|gojafahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijafahasha|gokijafahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafahnĂŒsha|jafahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojafahnknĂŒsha|gojafahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijafahnĂŒsha|gokijafahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafahshĂ«sha|jafahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafahnkshĂ«sha|gojafahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafahshĂ«sha|gokijafahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafahrosha|jafahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafahnkrosha|gojafahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafahrosha|gokijafahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jafahmusha|jafahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafahnkmusha|gojafahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafahmusha|gokijafahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jafahsherasha|jafahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojafahnksherasha|gojafahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijafahsherasha|gokijafahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jafahngasha|jafahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojafahnkngasha|gojafahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijafahngasha|gokijafahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jafahyasha|jafahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojafahnkyasha|gojafahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijafahyasha|gokijafahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jafahyamasha|jafahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojafahnkyamasha|gojafahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijafahyamasha|gokijafahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafahnĂŒshĂ«sha|jafahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojafahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijafahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafahnĂŒrosha|jafahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafahnknĂŒrosha|gojafahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafahnĂŒrosha|gokijafahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafahnĂŒmusha|jafahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafahnknĂŒmusha|gojafahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafahnĂŒmusha|gokijafahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafahshĂ«nĂŒsha|jafahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojafahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijafahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafahshĂ«rosha|jafahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafahnkshĂ«rosha|gojafahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafahshĂ«rosha|gokijafahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafahshĂ«musha|jafahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafahnkshĂ«musha|gojafahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafahshĂ«musha|gokijafahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafahronĂŒsha|jafahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafahnkronĂŒsha|gojafahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafahronĂŒsha|gokijafahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafahroshĂ«sha|jafahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafahnkroshĂ«sha|gojafahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafahroshĂ«sha|gokijafahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafahromusha|jafahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafahnkromusha|gojafahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafahromusha|gokijafahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafahmunĂŒsha|jafahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafahnkmunĂŒsha|gojafahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafahmunĂŒsha|gokijafahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafahmushĂ«sha|jafahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafahnkmushĂ«sha|gojafahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafahmushĂ«sha|gokijafahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafahmurosha|jafahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafahnkmurosha|gojafahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafahmurosha|gokijafahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jafah|jafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠh|jĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojafah|hojafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠfĂŠh|hojĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojafah|hohojafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠfĂŠh|hohojĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjafah|nĂŒjafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠfĂŠh|nĂŒjĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjafah|nĂŒnĂŒjafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠfĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjafah|nĂŻjafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠfĂŠh|nĂŻjĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjafah|nĂŻnĂŻjafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠfĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujafah|lujafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠfĂŠh|lujĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujafah|lulujafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠfĂŠh|lulujĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijafah|lijafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠfĂŠh|lijĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijafah|lilijafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠfĂŠh|lilijĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojafah|kojafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠfĂŠh|kojĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojafah|kokojafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠfĂŠh|kokojĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejafah|kejafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠfĂŠh|kejĂŠfĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejafah|kekejafah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠfĂŠh|kekejĂŠfĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
